end return(function(X,i,p,y,O,H,r,v,o,I,V,t,S,R,K,d,e,q,A,Y,n,Z)q,V,o,A,d,K,t,Y,I,S,e,v,n,R,Z=function(X,g)local i=e(g)local p=function(p,y)return A(X,{p,y},g,i)end return p
